description: A large nylon pouch that can hold a 1-quart canteen, like those issued to the U.S. soldiers.  Can serve as an impromptu dump pouch.

variants.description: A large nylon pouch, intended to hold a single 1-quart canteen, like those issued to the U.S. G.I.'s.  Can serve as an impromptu dump pouch.  <variant:multicam>

description: A nylon pouch for collecting items, primarily empty magazines, for sorting later.  It is currently unfolded and is ready to collect, taking up a fair bit of space when full.  Activate to fold back.

description: A nylon box pouch with a flap.  While intended to carry loose ammunition, it can be used as an impromptu dump pouch of a more general variety.

description: A tall nylon pouch for storing water bottles.  Takes in tall bottles up to 1.5L in capacity.

variants.description: A tall nylon pouch for storing water bottles.  The flap can be securely held closed by a robust plastic buckle.  Takes in tall bottles up to 1.5L in capacity.  <variant:black>

description: A skeletonized nylon pouch made with two orthogonal straps supported by elastic bands and a generous amount of threading.  Intended to hold a full-sized two-way radio for military communications, it can hold a single smaller item in its stead.

description: A nylon pouch with two compartments.  The smaller front compartment is designed to hold smaller smartphones or other digital devices.  The larger back compartment can hold something larger, like a small power bank.  The latter also has two thin pouches for things like plastic cards.

description: A small nylon pouch, intended to hold a compact field flashlight.

description: A small nylon bag.  Can be worn over the shoulder or strapped to webbing.  Has plenty of pockets.

variants.description: A small nylon bag that has both MOLLE straps and a shoulder strap.  It can be worn over the shoulder or attached to a PALS webbing.  Best used on an expedition where you may not need a lot of ammo, but would require food, drink, medication, or other short-term supplies.  <variant:multicam>

description: A nylon pouch for storing handcuffs.  Can also store a bit of cordage.

variants.description: A square nylon pouch with a flap.  Intended for holding chain handcuffs, to be worn by a sworn officer of the law.  Should also be able to store a bit of cordage.  <variant:black>
A square nylon pouch with a flap.  Intended for holding chain handcuffs, to be worn by a sworn officer of the law.  Should also be able to store a bit of cordage.  <variant:coyote>

description: A nylon box pouch.  Can be used to hold a small quantity of anything useful in the field.

variants.description: A nylon box pouch, essentially a miniature dump pouch.  Can be used to store a small quantity of anything, including loose ammunition, batteries, and matches.  Sized perfectly to fit a single Barrett M82 10-round magazine.  <variant:multicam>

description: A compact pouch for storing small tools.  Can be attached to webbing and carried on your backpack or load-bearing vest.

variants.description: A compact, low-profile MOLLE pouch for storing small tools and miscellanea.  Features half-a-dozen different pockets, including one on the outside that's the perfect fit for a smartphone, and even more straps on the inside.  <variant:multicam>

description: A nylon pouch for storing water bottles.  Takes in bottles up to 0.75L in capacity.

variants.description: A nylon pouch for storing water bottles.  The top can be constrained by a drawstring.  Takes in bottles up to 0.75L in capacity.  <variant:black>

description: A nylon pouch for holding air horn canisters.  This one is fitted for 8 oz canisters and will not accept smaller ones.

variants.description: A nylon pouch for storing air horn canisters.  Typically used by police for crowd control, as well as by maritime security.  Since the canister is being held by the embrace of the pouch itself, and this pouch is fitted for 8 oz air horns, smaller canisters will not fit.  <variant:black>

description: A nylon pouch for holding pepper spray canisters.  Accepts most common compact sprayers.

variants.description: A slim nylon pouch for holding pepper spray canisters.  Typically used by police for crowd control, as well as for self-defense by civilians.  A retention cord keeps the canister soundly inside the pouch.  <variant:black>

description: A large, rigid pouch meant to hold a pair of binoculars.  Has a couple of elastic loops for tools or batteries inside.

variants.description: A large, rigid pouch, intended to hold a pair of binoculars.  Interior padding cushions the binoculars stored.  The loops on the inside of the cover can store a pair of tools or spare batteries.  <variant:black>

A large, rigid pouch, intended to hold a pair of binoculars.  Interior padding cushions the binoculars stored.  The loops on the inside of the cover can store a pair of tools or spare batteries.  <variant:od>

description: A large nylon pouch for carrying one's gas mask.  Designed to take in a variety of gas masks, in a pinch it can be used as an impromptu dump pouch.  This model can attach to webbing or be worn at the leg.

variants.description: A large nylon pouch for carrying one's gas mask, as issued to U.S. Marine Corps.  Designed to take in a variety of gas masks, in a pinch it can be used as an impromptu dump pouch.  This model can attach to PALS webbing or be worn at the leg.  <variant:coyote>
